title: CSS Colors and Backgrounds Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential color models and background properties for styling your web pages.

questions.question: Which of these is the MOST common color model used in professional web design?
In the 'RGBA' color model, what does the 'A' represent?
Which 'background-size' value makes a background image fully cover its container without any white space (even if it crops the image)?
The 'background-attachment: fixed' property makes it so that __________?
options: The image moves with the page.
The background image stays fixed in place while the user scrolls.
The background image is automatically mirrored.

questions.question: Which of these is NOT an image, but a way to create color transitions in CSS?
